heading: Export charge determination and publication
label: 1683c Export charge determination and publication
notes: Effective DateSection effective 60 days after , see , set out as a note under .June 18, 2008section 3301(b) of Pub. L. 110–246section 1683 of this title

children.heading: Determination
children.label: a Determination
children.text: The Under Secretary for International Trade of the Department of Commerce shall determine, on a monthly basis, any export charges (expressed as a percentage of export price) to be collected by a country of export from exporters of softwood lumber or softwood lumber products described in in order to ensure compliance with any international agreement entered into by that country and the United States.section 1683b(a) of this title

children.heading: Publication
children.label: b Publication
children.text: The Under Secretary for International Trade shall immediately publish any determination made under subsection (a) on the website of the International Trade Administration of the Department of Commerce, and in any other manner the Under Secretary considers appropriate.
